input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A yellow sun graphic sits on a pink and blue gradient background. White outlined text inside reads Nikki. Then, Vegan appears below Nikki in the same font. The text changes within the central circle while rays and background stay static.</think><action>silent</action>

[4-6] A hand pours yellow liquid from a green scoop into a blender cup near pumpkins; a wooden spoon then mixes the sauce with pasta in the pot near a red striped cloth. [6-8] The spoon lifts coated pasta, showing creamy texture, then serves it onto a white plate on a pink checkered cloth. [8-10] A close-up of the plated pasta shows large grey text "Vegan" overlaid. [10-12] The text updates to "+ Vegan +" with "Mac and Cheese" below in serif font between lines. [12-14] Text fades to a woman with blonde hair and red lipstick in a white t-shirt with red script, sitting near a macrame hanging, with a pasta overlay on the right. [14-16] The overlay vanishes, revealing the woman fully as a green-yellow circle graphic appears bottom-left with "Like, Share, and Subscribe!" and a cursor clicking a red button. [18-20] A woman with blonde hair and red lipstick in a white t-shirt with red

[84-90] A hand with dark nail polish pours yellow granular contents from a yellow container into a small green measuring cup balanced on the rim of a clear blender cup containing orange squash chunks and beige cashew butter. The hand then tips the green cup to dump the yellow powder onto the ingredients. An "Artisan" jar sits on the table to the left. [90-92] The green cup is removed, and the hand holds a small pink measuring spoon over the mixture. Decorative pumpkins and a striped cloth remain visible on the white table in the background throughout the sequence.

[94-96] A hand holds a small white shaker over a clear blender cup containing orange squash chunks, beige butter, and yellow powder, appearing to add seasoning. [96-100] The hand pours white liquid from a white carton with green text through a small purple funnel into the cup, steadily raising the liquid level. [100-102] Once pouring finishes, a hand positions a dark grey pot containing a pink measuring cup next to the blender, which now holds the white liquid mixed with the solid ingredients on a white table decorated with pumpkins and a striped cloth.

[102-110] A hand with dark nail polish uses a pink measuring cup to transfer clear liquid from a dark grey pot with a white interior into a clear blender cup containing yellow chunks and fluid. The left hand holds the pot steady while the right hand scoops liquid and pours it into the cup. The hand moves the measuring cup back to the pot to scoop more liquid. In the background, decorative pumpkins in white, orange, and yellow sit on a wooden board alongside a small cactus, resting on a red and white striped cloth atop a white table.

[110-118] A hand with dark nail polish uses a pink measuring cup to transfer clear liquid from a dark grey pot with a white interior into a clear blender cup containing a yellow mixture. The hand moves the cup back to the pot to scoop more liquid, then pours it into the blender cup again. Another hand holds the pot steady. Decorative pumpkins and a cactus sit on a wooden board in the background atop a striped cloth. This scooping and pouring action repeats.

[4-6] A hand pours yellow liquid from a green scoop into a blender cup near pumpkins; a wooden spoon then mixes the sauce with pasta in the pot near a red striped cloth. [6-8] The spoon lifts coated pasta, showing creamy texture, then serves it onto a white plate on a pink checkered cloth. [8-10] A close-up of the plated pasta shows large grey text "Vegan" overlaid. [10-12] The text updates to "+ Vegan +" with "Mac and Cheese" below in serif font between lines. [12-14] Text fades to a woman with blonde hair and red lipstick in a white t-shirt with red script, sitting near a macrame hanging, with a pasta overlay on the right. [14-16] The overlay vanishes, revealing the woman fully as a green-yellow circle graphic appears bottom-left with "Like, Share, and Subscribe!" and a cursor clicking a red button. [18-20] A woman with blonde hair and red lipstick in a white t-shirt with red

[182-184] A blonde woman holds a poster of a brunette in a green shirt reading "IF LOOKS COULD KALE" as a "Vegetaryn" logo overlays the bottom left. [184-186] The poster and logo vanish, revealing the speaker in a white t-shirt with red "Sriracha" script against bohemian decor. [186-190] A vertical image overlay appears on the right showing the speaker sitting on a wooden ladder in the same outfit, remaining visible as she continues speaking and gesturing to the camera.

[190-192] Two women sit at a wooden table wearing matching white t-shirts with red 'Sriracha' script; a blonde woman is on the left and a brunette with glasses is on the right, with a small green potted succulent in the foreground. [192-194] The scene transitions to a collage of three vertical photographs displaying models wearing the white 'Sriracha' t-shirt, featuring styling variations like a red bandana and pink velvet pants against colorful backdrops. [194-196] The scene shifts to a single static image showing the blonde speaker smiling, wearing the white shirt with red script text, positioned in front of a beige macrame wall hanging. [196-198] The video displays a static photograph of the smiling woman with wavy blonde hair wearing the white t-shirt with red script text reading "Sriracha" centered before the macrame hanging, remaining fixed.

[198-206] A woman with wavy blonde hair, wearing a white t-shirt with red script text "Sriracha," speaks directly to the camera. She begins by raising both hands to her chest, displaying dark nail polish, and gesturing with spread fingers while articulating. As she continues speaking, she lowers her hands slightly and eventually out of the frame. The background remains consistent, featuring a beige macrame wall hanging, sunburst mirrors, and shelves with plants.

Between 206s and 214s, a blonde woman wearing a white t-shirt with red script text speaks directly to the camera. A large white text graphic reading "NV20" with a black outline appears in the upper left corner. Her hands remain clasped before her chest against a static background of macrame and mirrors. By 210s, the "NV20" graphic disappears, and her hands lower out of frame. Subsequently, a graphic overlay appears in the bottom right corner featuring a pink and blue watercolor circle with social media icons and text including "NIKKIVVEGAN" and "#NIKKIVEGAN".

recent_thinks: [16-18] The woman with wavy blonde hair and red lipstick faces forward in a white t-shirt. Her mouth moves as she speaks, and her hands rise to clasp together in front of her chest. The green and yellow circular graphic containing the text "Like, Share, and Subscribe!" remains stationary in the bottom left corner of the screen.

[72-74] A hand holds the open jar of cashew butter over a clear blender cup containing orange squash chunks. A metal spoon scoops the creamy beige butter from the jar. The jar's gold lid rests on the white table surface to the left. Decorative pumpkins sit in the background.

[92-94] A hand with dark nail polish tilts a pink measuring spoon, pouring white granules into the blender cup. The cup holds orange squash chunks, beige butter, and yellow powder. Decorative pumpkins and a striped cloth sit on the white table in the background.

[214-216] The blonde woman continues speaking in a white t-shirt with red script text. The pink and blue circular graphic containing social media handles stays fixed in the bottom right corner. She gestures with her right hand near her chest, fingers slightly curled, while maintaining eye contact with the camera.

queries.question: What pattern is visible on the cloth under the silver saucepan? A. Green and white striped B. Red and white checkered C. Blue solid D. Yellow floral

samples.output: <think>The blonde woman wearing a white t-shirt with red script text clasps her hands together in front of her chest. She continues speaking directly to the camera while the pink and blue circular graphic with social media handles remains stationary in the bottom right corner.</think><action>silent</action>

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

[150-156] The camera holds a steady, low-angle side profile of a white bowl filled with yellow spiral fusilli pasta. The noodles are coated in a glossy, creamy sauce that reflects the light. The bowl sits atop a textured, woven beige placemat, with a red and white checkered napkin visible beneath the left rim. The shot remains static, focusing on the finished dish's texture. [156-158] The video cuts to a woman with shoulder-length wavy blonde hair and bright red lipstick. She wears a white t-shirt featuring the red script text "Sriracha." Seated in a room with bohemian decor, including a large macrame wall hanging, two round sunburst mirrors, a white shelf with potted plants, and a glass side table, she speaks directly to the camera.

[158-166] A woman with wavy blonde hair and red lipstick faces the camera, wearing a white t-shirt with the red script text "Sriracha". She speaks continuously, her mouth transitioning between open and closed positions. The background remains static, featuring a large beige macrame wall hanging centered behind her. To the left, a built-in shelf holds various potted plants. To the right, two round mirrors with sunburst frames hang on the wall above a glass side table stacked with books and decor. The scene is brightly lit and the camera remains fixed on her upper body.

[166-174] A woman with wavy blonde hair and red lipstick speaks directly to the camera, wearing a white t-shirt with the red script text "Sriracha". [180-182] She then holds up a large white poster board on the right side of the frame. [72-74] A hand holds the open jar of cashew butter over a clear blender cup containing orange squash chunks. A metal spoon scoops the creamy beige butter from the jar. The jar's gold lid rests on the white table surface to the left. Decorative pumpkins sit in the background.

[92-94] A hand with dark nail polish tilts a pink measuring spoon, pouring white granules into the blender cup. The cup holds orange squash chunks, beige butter, and yellow powder. Decorative pumpkins and a striped cloth sit on the white table in the background.

[184-186] The poster displaying a brunette in a green shirt and the "Vegetaryn" logo overlay vanish from the frame. The blonde woman in the white t-shirt with red script text continues facing the camera, gesturing with her hands while speaking in the brightly lit room with bohemian decor.
